issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (activates when you play a Character with [Trigger]), not 'Activated'. 'Activated' is for manually activatable abilities.
Missing duration field. Text contains '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn' (not Permanent or EndOfTurn).
Condition is incomplete. Should include 'HasCardOnBoard' or similar to verify a Character with [Trigger] was just played. Current 'Always' is too broad.
Action says 'Give up to 2 rested DON!!' but DSL shows AttachDon with count:2. Should clarify that only rested DON cards can be selected, or this may be a targeting/condition limitation.
